name: apple-rest-mcp
description: Apple apps for contacts, notes, messages, mail, reminders, calendar, and maps — over MCP and a networked read-only REST API.
long_description: apple-rest-mcp gives LLMs and self-hosted agents access to Apple's native apps (Contacts, Notes, Messages, Mail, Reminders, Calendar, Maps). A fork of Dhravya Shah's apple-mcp, it adds a network mode: MCP over Streamable HTTP plus a read-only REST API (/api/v1) for bulk and structured reads, with per-token access scopes (a read-only token that cannot send mail/messages) and a macOS LaunchAgent for persistent deployment. This manifest packages the stdio MCP server for Claude Desktop; see the repository for network mode.

tools.name: contacts
tools.description: Search and retrieve contacts from Apple Contacts app

tools.name: notes
tools.description: Search, retrieve and create notes in Apple Notes app

tools.name: messages
tools.description: Interact with Apple Messages app - send, read, schedule messages and check unread messages

tools.name: mail
tools.description: Interact with Apple Mail app - read unread emails, search emails, and send emails

tools.name: reminders
tools.description: List, search, create, and open reminders in Apple Reminders app

tools.name: calendar
tools.description: Search, create, and open calendar events in Apple Calendar app

tools.name: maps
tools.description: Search locations, manage guides, save favorites, and get directions using Apple Maps
